violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Kitchen equipment observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Kitchen equipment must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Kitchen carts observed lined with cardboard. The grill is lined with aluminum wrap. Shelves observed lined with sheet pan liners. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, tilt skillet, oven, 10 burner stove, grill/broiler, kitchen carts, unused dipper well, and the speed rail in the bar have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Chest freezer has an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

The floors and some kitchen walls have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026
The wall between the stove and oven is in poor repair, with chipped paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The floor and wall junctures beneath the 3 bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Ice observed accumulating on the door and gasket of the walk in freezer. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026
